message:
refactor(tui): improve overlay rendering order and modernize pattern usage

- Always render screen content before overlay to prevent missing background
  when overlay is active (was previously conditional and could skip screen render)
- Replace if-let chains with idiomatic map_or_else for actions/counters panels
- Deduplicate identical Explainability and Ballast footer keybinding strings
- Accept Overlay by Copy instead of reference in frame_render_overlay
- Use .clamp(min, max) instead of .min().max() chains for overlay dimensions
- Update Confirmation variant match pattern for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
